Call ID: EXT-019
Type: external
Date: 2026-06-27
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Hannah (account manager); Owen (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Hannah): Hi Owen, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Owen): We love the core product but the integrations feel limited.
AM (Hannah): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Owen): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Hannah): That's really useful — I'll get this to product with your context.
Customer (Owen): Good conversation — send me that summary and we'll align internally.
AM (Hannah): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
